evals.expected_output: API_DOCS.md written next to the IR file and shown inline: a one-paragraph overview, then one section per operation in IR order with a resolved REST path/verb, an auth/scopes/idempotency/pagination summary line, filled request/response field tables, an error table, and synthesized examples marked _(example)_.
assertions: API_DOCS.md is written next to the IR file and also shown inline
No <DESCRIPTION:...> or <EXAMPLE:...> placeholder remains unfilled in the final doc
Every synthesized request/response body example is marked _(example)_
Operations appear in the same order as the source IR, not reordered by name

evals.prompt: generate API reference docs for this: implementation/api-docs/scripts/fixtures/bookmark_api.ir.json
